original_image_tags: A tan/brown manila file folder or document jacket. At the top, handwritten in blue or black ink: "62 - 83894 - 353". The number "353" is written in red ink, larger than the preceding numbers. A stamped word "ENCLOSURE" is visible in the upper left corner. A single hole punch is centered at the top. There is a vertical crease or fold mark down the center of the folder, with a white, possibly adhesive, residue or remnant along the lower portion of the crease. Two hole punches are visible at the bottom edge. The folder shows minor wear and discoloration consistent with age.

elements.description: A tan file folder or enclosure envelope with a typed 'ENCLOSURE' label at the top left, handwritten numbers '62- 83894' in pencil or light ink, and the number '353' written in red ink at the top right. The main body of the folder is blank, with a single vertical white paper tear or residue strip in the center and three black hole-punch holes along the bottom edge.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual content: a tan file folder with an 'ENCLOSURE' stamp, handwritten numbers '62-83894' and '353' in red, a central vertical crease/residue, and multiple hole punches.
